positional_bias.note: Re-derived correct positions from quiz.gift = [0,2,3,1,0,2]; matches sidecar. max_share 0.333 <= 0.40, all four positions used across 6 MCQs.

length_bias.note: No MCQ has its correct option exceeding 1.20x the mean distractor length after option-length balancing on Q4.

distractor_plausibility.note: All distractors are corpus-grounded beginner misconceptions (EU AI Act confusion, software-dev/security/model-build step lists, 'voluntary=volunteers', 'loop=yearly law', 'guarantees zero harm'). None score 1.

objective_coverage.note: LO1->Q1, LO2->Q2, LO3->Q3+Q4, LO4->Q5, LO5->Q6. All 5 corpus LOs covered; no orphan questions.

beginner_fairness_scope.note: AI RMF and NIST spelled out; all stems plain-language and answerable from this topic alone. Every question stays within the four functions / voluntary framing; no out_of_scope_question.

verdict: Pass — all bias and coverage checks clean. Positional max_share 0.333, longest-correct rate 0.0, no absurd distractors, full LO coverage, on-headline.
